# zstack_zbox_backup (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage ZBox backups in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the ZBox backup.
- `zbox_uuid` (String) The UUID of the ZBox.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the ZBox backup.
- `dry_run` (Boolean) Whether to run in dry-run mode.

### Read-Only

- `install_path` (String) The install path of the ZBox backup.
- `state` (String) The state of the ZBox backup.
- `total_size` (Number) The total size of the ZBox backup in bytes.
- `type` (String) The type of the ZBox backup.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the ZBox backup.
- `version` (String) The version of the ZBox backup.
